---
title: "Tutorials"
---

I maintain several dedicated tutorial sites covering various aspects of spatial data science, programming, and academic tools.

::: {.software-grid}

::: {.software-card}
![R Spatial](https://placehold.co/400x200/27ae60/ffffff?text=R+Spatial+Tutorials)
### R for Spatial Analysis
Comprehensive guide to handling vector and raster data using R (*sf*, *terra*, *stars*).
[📖 Visit Tutorial](https://pulakeshpradhan.github.io/rspatial/){.btn .btn-outline-primary .btn-sm}
:::

::: {.software-card}
![Google Earth Engine](https://placehold.co/400x200/2c7da0/ffffff?text=GEE+Tutorials)
### Google Earth Engine
Interactive guide and documentation for mastering cloud-based remote sensing.
[📖 Visit Tutorial](https://pulakeshpradhan.github.io/gee/intro.html){.btn .btn-outline-primary .btn-sm}
:::

::: {.software-card}
![Geospatial Reference](https://placehold.co/400x200/e67e22/ffffff?text=Geospatial+Reference)
### Geospatial Reference
A quick-reference guide for common geospatial operations in Python, R, and GEE.
[📖 Visit Tutorial](https://pulakeshpradhan.github.io/geospatial/){.btn .btn-outline-primary .btn-sm}
:::

::: {.software-card}
![Geo-Python](https://placehold.co/400x200/34495e/ffffff?text=Geo-Python)
### Geo-Python
Learning spatial data science with Python using *Geopandas*, *Rasterio*, and *Xarray*.
[📖 Visit Tutorial](https://pulakeshpradhan.github.io/geopython/){.btn .btn-outline-primary .btn-sm}
:::

::: {.software-card}
![Cloud GIS](https://placehold.co/400x200/2980b9/ffffff?text=Cloud+GIS)
### Cloud GIS & AI
Resources on merging cloud computing with artificial intelligence for advanced GIS.
[📖 Visit Tutorial](https://pulakeshpradhan.github.io/cloudgis){.btn .btn-outline-primary .btn-sm}
:::

::: {.software-card}
![English for Academics](https://placehold.co/400x200/8e44ad/ffffff?text=Academic+English)
### English for Academics
Essential resources for scientific writing, presentations, and clear academic communication.
[📖 Visit Tutorial](https://pulakeshpradhan.github.io/english/){.btn .btn-outline-primary .btn-sm}
:::

::: {.software-card}
![LaTeX](https://placehold.co/400x200/2c3e50/ffffff?text=LaTeX+for+Scientists)
### LaTeX for Geographers
Professional document composition and high-quality thesis writing using LaTeX.
[📖 Visit Tutorial](https://pulakeshpradhan.github.io/latex){.btn .btn-outline-primary .btn-sm}
:::

:::
